calendar.matters:
Motion To Compel Arbitration Hearing Date And Request For Appointment Of Arbitrator; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Bradford D. Brown, Esq.; [Proposed] Order
Off Calendar Jul-07-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. BRADFORD D. BROWN, Esq. of Law Offices of Bradford D. Brown (Tel: 805-963-5607) for petitioners;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PETITIONERS JEANINE WRIGHT and AARON WRIGHT's Motion To Compel Arbitration And Request For Appointment Of Arbitrator.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Petitioner's motion to compel arbitration is granted as follows: The parties are ordered to arbitrate before R.A. Carrington Esq. and that arbitration shall commence on October 6, 2022. The parties agree that the arbitrator is suitable and there is no longer any urgency since respondent has waived any statute of limitations issue in writing. (Thorburn Decl., Ex. F.) It is within the discretion of the arbitrator to manage the arbitration proceedings including its duration. Nevertheless, the court will order that the arbitrator issue the award by December 31, 2022. (See Bosworth v. Whitmore (2006) 135 Cal.App.4th 536, 539; CCP 1293.8.)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
